problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Glial. Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
